parallel_feature_design.principle: Prize-aware scoring is a NEW PARALLEL feature track alongside existing M3+/replay scoring. It does NOT replace, deprecate, or modify the existing M3+ endpoint or any replay infrastructure.

existing_track_preserved.status: UNCHANGED — all existing tests, API contracts, DB queries, and research pre-registered against M3+ continue to use M3+ without modification
consumers_protected: all pre-registered hypothesis entries using M3+ as endpoint

new_parallel_track.implementation_mode: Read-only computed expressions at query time — no new columns written to strategy_prediction_replays, no schema change, no existing query modified
new_parallel_track.coexistence_guarantee: Prize-aware rates are reported as ADDITIONAL metrics alongside M3+ rates, never as substitutes. Any future report that includes prize-aware rates MUST also report the corresponding M3+ rate for the same cell.
new_parallel_track.promotion_gate: Prize-aware endpoints are evaluation tools only. They may not be used as standalone promotion gates without going through the full P221F pre-registration process.

parallel_feature_design.no_migration_path: There is no migration path from M3+ to prize-aware. Both tracks run in perpetuity. Deprecating M3+ requires a separate explicit governance decision with user authorization.

POWER_LOTTO.prize_tier_structure_source: lottery_api/CLAUDE.md (repo documentation — complete prize table for 威力彩 extracted from calc_prize docstring)
POWER_LOTTO.prize_amounts_source: NOT_MACHINE_READ — official page https://www.taiwanlottery.com/lotto/info/super_lotto638 is dynamically rendered (JavaScript SPA); curl/WebFetch returned navigation shell only; no prize amounts retrieved
POWER_LOTTO.notes: Prize tier matching conditions (number-of-hits + second-zone) are sourced from internal repo documentation and are consistent with publicly known 威力彩 rules. Prize amounts (NTD) are NOT included in this spec and must be verified against https://www.taiwanlottery.com/lotto/info/super_lotto638 before any production use.

BIG_LOTTO.prize_tier_structure_source: lottery_api/CLAUDE.md (repo documentation — complete prize table for 大樂透 extracted from calc_prize docstring)
BIG_LOTTO.prize_amounts_source: NOT_MACHINE_READ — official page https://www.taiwanlottery.com/lotto/info/lotto649 is dynamically rendered; no prize amounts retrieved
BIG_LOTTO.game_rules_source: lottery_api/CLAUDE.md + strategy_prediction_replays schema (actual_special present, predicted_special absent → special_hit logic confirmed as actual_special in predicted_numbers)
BIG_LOTTO.notes: Prize tier matching conditions are sourced from internal repo documentation. Prize amounts must be verified against official source before production use.

DAILY_539.prize_tier_structure_source: lottery_api/calculate_win_probability.py (explicit prize tier enumeration: 頭獎5/5, 貳獎4/5, 參獎3/5, 肆獎2/5) + lottery_api/tools/predict_539.py (confirms 'No special number') + lottery_api/CLAUDE.md (5/39 rules, no second zone)
DAILY_539.prize_amounts_source: NOT_MACHINE_READ — official page https://www.taiwanlottery.com/lotto/info/daily_cash is dynamically rendered; no prize amounts retrieved
DAILY_539.game_rules_source: Multiple repo sources confirm 5 numbers from 1-39, no special number, no second zone
DAILY_539.notes: Prize tier matching conditions sourced from repo code. No special/second-zone number exists for DAILY_539 (confirmed by schema: predicted_special=0, actual_special=0 across all 34,680 DAILY_539 replay rows).

POWER_LOTTO.pick_rule: Pick 6 numbers from 1-38 (first zone) + Pick 1 number from 1-8 (second zone / power number)
POWER_LOTTO.special_hit_logic: predicted_special == actual_special (exact match of second-zone number prediction)
POWER_LOTTO.note_prize_amounts: NOT_VERIFIED — parimutuel jackpot structure; fixed amounts for lower tiers; must verify at https://www.taiwanlottery.com/lotto/info/super_lotto638

BIG_LOTTO.pick_rule: Pick 6 numbers from 1-49 (main numbers); special number drawn from remaining 43 balls after main draw
BIG_LOTTO.special_number_pool: Drawn from remaining 43 balls (not a separate pool)
BIG_LOTTO.special_hit_logic: actual_special IN predicted_numbers (the actual special number is among the 6 predicted main numbers)
BIG_LOTTO.note_prize_amounts: NOT_VERIFIED — parimutuel structure for top tiers; fixed amounts for lower tiers; must verify at https://www.taiwanlottery.com/lotto/info/lotto649

DAILY_539.pick_rule: Pick 5 numbers from 1-39 (main numbers only; no special number; no second zone)
DAILY_539.special_number: NONE — no special number exists for DAILY_539
DAILY_539.second_zone: NONE — no second zone exists for DAILY_539
DAILY_539.special_hit_logic: N/A — special_hit is always 0 for DAILY_539 (confirmed: 0 actual_special rows in 34,680 DAILY_539 replay rows)
DAILY_539.note_prize_amounts: NOT_VERIFIED — fixed amounts; must verify at https://www.taiwanlottery.com/lotto/info/daily_cash

POWER_LOTTO.existing_m3plus_diagnostic_endpoint: M3+ (hit_count>=3 for first zone, special_hit excluded from M3+ definition per P265A SSOT)

BIG_LOTTO.existing_m3plus_diagnostic_endpoint: M3+ (hit_count>=3, special_hit excluded per P265A SSOT)

DAILY_539.existing_m3plus_diagnostic_endpoint: M3+ (hit_count>=3, no special_hit since DAILY_539 has none)

POWER_M1_PLUS_SECOND.description: At least 1 first-zone main-number hit AND second-zone (special) hit
POWER_M1_PLUS_SECOND.notes: Covers all second-zone-inclusive prize tiers from 普獎 upward. Requires predicted_special to be populated.

POWER_M2_PLUS_SECOND.description: At least 2 first-zone hits AND second-zone hit
POWER_M2_PLUS_SECOND.notes: Covers 捌獎 (2+second) and higher with second-zone.

POWER_M3_PLUS_SECOND.description: At least 3 first-zone hits AND second-zone hit
POWER_M3_PLUS_SECOND.notes: Covers 柒獎 (3+second) and higher with second-zone.

POWER_M4_PLUS_SECOND.description: At least 4 first-zone hits AND second-zone hit
POWER_M4_PLUS_SECOND.notes: Covers 伍獎 (4+second) and higher with second-zone.

POWER_M5_PLUS_SECOND.description: At least 5 first-zone hits AND second-zone hit
POWER_M5_PLUS_SECOND.notes: Covers 參獎 (5+second) and 頭獎 (6+second).

POWER_M6_PLUS_SECOND.description: All 6 first-zone hits AND second-zone hit — jackpot (頭獎)
POWER_M6_PLUS_SECOND.notes: Jackpot only. Extremely rare; not a useful evaluation endpoint for strategy research given low base rate.

POWER_M6_NO_SECOND.description: All 6 first-zone hits AND no second-zone hit (貳獎)
POWER_M6_NO_SECOND.notes: 2nd prize only (all 6 first-zone, second-zone miss). Extremely rare.

POWER_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN.description: Any prize-winning combination per official prize table
POWER_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN.derivation: Union of all prize conditions: ranks 1-10. hit_count>=3 covers 玖獎/柒獎/肆獎/參獎/貳獎/頭獎; (hit_count>=1 AND special_hit=1) covers 普獎/捌獎/伍獎/參獎/頭獎. Their union covers all 10 prize tiers.
POWER_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN.notes: This is the most comprehensive prize-aware success endpoint for POWER_LOTTO.

POWER_TIER_CLASS.description: Categorical prize tier classification per draw-bet
POWER_TIER_CLASS.notes: Mutually exclusive classification. Requires both hit_count and special_hit to be populated.

POWER_MAIN_M3_PLUS_DIAGNOSTIC.description: BACKWARD-COMPATIBLE DIAGNOSTIC ONLY: at least 3 first-zone main-number hits (special_hit excluded)
POWER_MAIN_M3_PLUS_DIAGNOSTIC.notes: This is the existing P265A SSOT M3+ endpoint. It is a main-number-only diagnostic, NOT a prize-aware success endpoint. hit_count>=3 covers 玖獎(3/no-second), 柒獎(3+second), 陸獎(4/no-second), 伍獎(4+second), 肆獎(5/no-second), 參獎(5+second), 貳獎(6/no-second), 頭獎(6+second) — but MISSES 捌獎(2+second) and 普獎(1+second). Use POWER_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN for full prize coverage.

POWER_MAIN_M4_PLUS_DIAGNOSTIC.description: BACKWARD-COMPATIBLE DIAGNOSTIC ONLY: at least 4 first-zone hits (special_hit excluded)
POWER_MAIN_M4_PLUS_DIAGNOSTIC.notes: Main-number diagnostic for higher-tier coverage analysis. Not a complete prize-aware endpoint.

BIG_M2_PLUS_SPECIAL.description: At least 2 main-number hits AND special number hit
BIG_M2_PLUS_SPECIAL.notes: Covers 普獎 (2+special) and higher with special. special_hit is computed as actual_special IN predicted_numbers.

BIG_M3_PLUS_SPECIAL.description: At least 3 main-number hits AND special number hit
BIG_M3_PLUS_SPECIAL.notes: Covers 陸獎 (3+special) and higher with special.

BIG_M4_PLUS_SPECIAL.description: At least 4 main-number hits AND special number hit
BIG_M4_PLUS_SPECIAL.notes: Covers 肆獎 (4+special) and higher with special.

BIG_M5_PLUS_SPECIAL.description: At least 5 main-number hits AND special number hit
BIG_M5_PLUS_SPECIAL.notes: Covers 貳獎 (5+special) only — 2nd prize. Extremely rare.

BIG_M6_MAIN.description: All 6 main-number hits — jackpot (頭獎), regardless of special
BIG_M6_MAIN.notes: Jackpot tier. Note: for 大樂透 the jackpot is 6/6 main match; special_hit does not distinguish sub-tiers at 6-hit level.

BIG_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN.description: Any prize-winning combination per official prize table
BIG_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN.derivation: Union of all prize conditions: hit_count>=3 covers 柒獎/陸獎/伍獎/肆獎/參獎/貳獎/頭獎; (hit_count=2 AND special_hit=1) covers 普獎. All 8 prize tiers covered.
BIG_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN.notes: Most comprehensive prize-aware success endpoint for BIG_LOTTO.

BIG_TIER_CLASS.description: Categorical prize tier classification per draw-bet
BIG_TIER_CLASS.notes: Mutually exclusive classification. special_hit is actual_special IN predicted_numbers; this is always available from actual_special (100% populated).

BIG_MAIN_M3_PLUS_DIAGNOSTIC.description: BACKWARD-COMPATIBLE DIAGNOSTIC ONLY: at least 3 main-number hits (special_hit excluded from count)
BIG_MAIN_M3_PLUS_DIAGNOSTIC.notes: Existing P265A SSOT M3+ endpoint. NOT prize-aware: misses 普獎 (2+special). Use BIG_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN for full prize coverage.

BIG_MAIN_M4_PLUS_DIAGNOSTIC.description: BACKWARD-COMPATIBLE DIAGNOSTIC ONLY: at least 4 main-number hits (special_hit excluded)
BIG_MAIN_M4_PLUS_DIAGNOSTIC.notes: Main-number diagnostic for higher-tier analysis. Not a complete prize-aware endpoint.

D539_M2_PLUS.description: At least 2 main-number hits — lowest prize tier (肆獎) and above
D539_M2_PLUS.notes: Covers all prize tiers for DAILY_539 including the minimum 2-match prize.

D539_M3_PLUS.description: At least 3 main-number hits — 參獎 and above
D539_M3_PLUS.notes: Covers 3/4/5-match prize tiers. This is also the existing P265A SSOT M3+ diagnostic endpoint, which IS prize-aware for DAILY_539 (since no lower prizes are missed by M3+, except 肆獎). To count 肆獎 (2-match), use D539_M2_PLUS.

D539_M4_PLUS.description: At least 4 main-number hits — 貳獎 and above

D539_M5.description: All 5 main-number hits — jackpot (頭獎) only
D539_M5.notes: Jackpot (頭獎) only. Extremely rare (1 in ~575,757 draws).

D539_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN.description: Any prize-winning combination for DAILY_539 (any of 4 prize tiers)
D539_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN.derivation: Identical to D539_M2_PLUS since all DAILY_539 prize tiers require at least 2 main-number hits.
D539_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN.notes: For DAILY_539, ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN == D539_M2_PLUS. No special/second zone exists.

D539_TIER_CLASS.description: Categorical prize tier classification per draw-bet for DAILY_539
D539_TIER_CLASS.notes: No special_hit or second_zone involved. Fully determined by hit_count.

tier_class_definitions.description: Summary mapping of TIER_CLASS values to prize rank, for all three lottery types

backward_compatibility_notes.architectural_principle: Prize-aware scoring is a NEW PARALLEL FEATURE, not a replacement for M3+/replay scoring. Both tracks run concurrently. M3+ is NOT deprecated.
backward_compatibility_notes.existing_m3plus_endpoint: The existing P265A SSOT M3+ endpoint (hit_count >= 3, special_hit excluded) remains the canonical research diagnostic endpoint. All pre-registered hypotheses, API contracts, and existing tests using M3+ continue unchanged. Prize-aware endpoints are ADDITIVE — they run in parallel and are reported alongside M3+, never instead of it.
backward_compatibility_notes.POWER_LOTTO_M3_gap: M3+ misses POWER_LOTTO 捌獎 (hit=2, second=YES) and 普獎 (hit=1, second=YES). POWER_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN provides full-prize coverage as a parallel metric.
backward_compatibility_notes.BIG_LOTTO_M3_gap: M3+ misses BIG_LOTTO 普獎 (hit=2, special=YES). BIG_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN provides full-prize coverage as a parallel metric.
backward_compatibility_notes.DAILY_539_M3_gap: M3+ misses DAILY_539 肆獎 (hit=2). D539_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN (= D539_M2_PLUS) provides full-prize coverage as a parallel metric. M3+ remains useful as a higher-bar diagnostic.
backward_compatibility_notes.DAILY_539_special_note: For DAILY_539, M3+ covers 參獎/貳獎/頭獎. The parallel prize-aware track adds 肆獎 (2-match). Both are valid concurrently.
backward_compatibility_notes.coexistence_rule: Any future research report including prize-aware rates MUST also include the corresponding M3+ rate for the same strategy cell. Neither track alone is sufficient.
backward_compatibility_notes.no_replacement_allowed: Implementing prize-aware scoring does NOT authorize removing, changing, or re-weighting M3+ in any existing endpoint, test, or API response.

relevant_fields.target_draw: TEXT — draw number (must cast to INTEGER for ordering)
relevant_fields.replay_status: TEXT — must be PREDICTED for valid evaluation rows
relevant_fields.predicted_special: INTEGER or NULL — predicted second-zone number for POWER_LOTTO (populated for 9,000/36,104 rows = ~25%); NULL for BIG_LOTTO; NULL for DAILY_539
relevant_fields.actual_numbers: TEXT (JSON array) — actual drawn main numbers
relevant_fields.actual_special: INTEGER or NULL — actual special/second-zone number; populated for POWER_LOTTO (100%) and BIG_LOTTO (100%); NULL for DAILY_539
relevant_fields.hit_count: INTEGER — number of predicted main-number hits in actual main numbers
relevant_fields.hit_numbers: TEXT (JSON array) — which predicted numbers were hits
relevant_fields.special_hit: INTEGER (0/1) — for POWER_LOTTO: predicted_special==actual_special; for BIG_LOTTO: actual_special IN predicted_numbers; for DAILY_539: always 0
relevant_fields.dry_run: INTEGER — must be 0 for production evaluation rows

schema_limitations.POWER_LOTTO_predicted_special_gap: predicted_special is NULL for 27,104/36,104 POWER_LOTTO rows (~75%). This means POWER_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN cannot be computed for these rows when it depends on special_hit for hit_count < 3. The special_hit column reflects whether the prediction was made AND matched. For rows where predicted_special IS NULL, special_hit = 0 (default). This may undercount 普獎/捌獎 events where no second-zone prediction was made.
schema_limitations.BIG_LOTTO_predicted_special_absent: BIG_LOTTO has no predicted_special (0/24,140 rows). special_hit is computed post-hoc as actual_special IN predicted_numbers. This is correct and complete since BIG_LOTTO does not require predicting the special number separately.
schema_limitations.DAILY_539_no_special: DAILY_539 has no actual_special or predicted_special (confirmed 0/34,680 rows). All special-dependent endpoints are N/A.

for_prize_aware_scoring_implementation: special_hit — already present (with limitations noted above for POWER_LOTTO predicted_special gap)
lottery_type — already present (required to select correct endpoint logic)
tier_class — NOT YET COMPUTED in DB; must be derived from hit_count + special_hit using lottery_type-specific rules
any_prize_win — NOT YET COMPUTED; must be derived per lottery_type using POWER_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN / BIG_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN / D539_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN conditions
recommended_future_computed_columns_or_v: prize_tier_class TEXT — categorical tier per row (derived, not stored)
prize_aware_win INTEGER — 0/1 per row using ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN condition per lottery_type
required_future_code_fields.note: These fields should be computed at query time or in a read-only view, NOT written to strategy_prediction_replays (no DB write authorized in this task or in standard research mode).

forbidden_actions: No backtest was run in this task
No DB write occurred in this task
No hypothesis_registry.jsonl mutation occurred in this task
No strategy was generated in this task
No production/API/frontend code was modified in this task
No hit-rate improvement is claimed in this task
Prize-aware endpoints defined here are future evaluation specifications only, not betting advice

next_recommended_task.description: Prize-aware endpoint implementation — add prize_tier_class and any_prize_win computed logic to replay evaluation queries (read-only, no DB write). Run prize-aware success rate queries across all 36 replay-backed strategy cells. Compare prize-aware rates to existing M3+ diagnostic rates.
prerequisites: P271A spec review and user authorization
MANUAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED: user or reviewer confirms prize tier structures against official Taiwan Lottery pages before P271B implementation

limitations: Prize amounts (NTD values) are NOT included in this spec — official Taiwan Lottery pages are dynamically rendered and could not be machine-read. Prize tier MATCHING CONDITIONS are sourced from internal repo documentation (lottery_api/CLAUDE.md, calculate_win_probability.py) which are consistent with publicly known rules.

POWER_LOTTO predicted_special gap: 75% of POWER_LOTTO replay rows have NULL predicted_special. Prize-aware endpoints requiring second-zone prediction (POWER_M1_PLUS_SECOND through POWER_M6_PLUS_SECOND) will have coverage limitations for rows without predicted_special. POWER_ANY_PRIZE_AWARE_WIN is still computable but under-represents 普獎/捌獎 for rows without predicted_special.
Prize amounts require MANUAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED against official Taiwan Lottery pages before any prize-amount-dependent analysis.
This spec defines evaluation endpoints only — it does NOT define which endpoints qualify for strategy promotion gates. The existing P221F gate and governance rules remain in force.
No prize-aware backtest was run. No strategy performance under prize-aware metrics is claimed.
